problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to vs, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
